item.title: Why your SIEM needs a Data Pipeline Management platform
item.description: Why your SIEM needs a Data Pipeline Management platform

item.title: Reclaiming the Pipeline: Real-Time Detection Without Blowing the Budget
item.description: Stop wasting budget on unused logs and late detections. See how Abstract redefines SIEM with real-time, in-pipeline threat detection.

item.title: Redefining the SOC: Why AI Elevates (Not Replaces) the Next Generation of Analysts
item.description: Redefining the SOC: Why AI Elevates (Not Replaces) the Next Generation of Analysts

item.title: Salesforce Forensics: Telemetry for Detection & Response
item.description: Learn how to investigate intrusions in Salesforce using native telemetry like Event Monitoring, Setup Audit Trail, and Login History to detect attacker activity.

item.title: Security Data Pipelines Have Become the Center of the SOC. The Market Knows It, and So Do We.
item.description: Security data pipelines have become the center of the modern SOC. This blog breaks down SACR's 2025 SDPP report, industry consolidation, and how Abstract is leading with streaming detection and a composable SIEM architecture.

item.title: Shift-Left Detections with Abstract
item.description: Shift-Left Detections enables security teams to act in real time, minimizing delays and enhancing threat response with streaming analytics.

item.title: Shifting Detection Left: How to Decouple SIEM Detection Criteria for Modern Security Operations
item.description: Learn why decoupling detection from SIEM is key to modernizing SOCs. Explore migration strategies, reduce technical debt, and build future-ready detections.

item.title: Shrinking the Stack of Needles
item.description: Security teams don't struggle to find threats. They struggle with too much data. Learn how reducing your log volume improves detection speed, cost, and visibility.

item.title: Startup Partnerships: Lessons from the Front Lines
item.description: Startup Partnerships: Lessons from the Front Lines

item.title: Strengthening Integrations in the Abstract Security Platform
item.description: Going into 2025, Abstract Security continues to provide best-in-class technology to our customers and build upon our award-winning platfrom to eliminate the unneeded complexity involving data operations, all while enhancing threat insights. Here’s what you need to know about the latest integrations our teams have made available!

item.title: The Invisible Enemy: Unmasking Microsoft 365’s Logging Blind Spots
item.description: The Invisible Enemy: Unmasking Microsoft 365’s Logging Blind Spots

item.title: Thinking Beyond the Budget: Why Your Security Team Isn’t a Cost Center
item.description: Thinking Beyond the Budget: Why Your Security Team Isn’t a Cost Center

item.title: Trust and Community: The Peer-to-Peer Security Advantage
item.description: Trust and Community: The Peer-to-Peer Security Advantage

item.title: Uncovering Compromised Git Admins: How to Detect actors like theCom
item.description: Uncovering Compromised Git Admins: How to Detect actors like theCom

item.title: What Is a Security Data Pipeline Platform (SDPP) and Why Do Security Teams Need One?
item.description: Security data broke traditional pipelines and SIEM-centric architectures. SDPPs emerged to control telemetry at scale, reduce cost, and move detections closer to real time.

item.title: Why Health-ISAC Selected Abstract Security to Support Its Internal SIEM Operations
item.description: Health-ISAC selected Abstract Security to support its internal SIEM operations, bringing a streaming-first approach to security data and detection.

item.title: Cal Poly Incubator Interview
item.description: Cal Poly Incubator Interview

item.title: Abstract and Jon Oltsik: Future of Security Operations
item.description: Abstract and Jon Oltsik: Future of Security Operations

item.title: C2 Corner: From Frameworks to Flywheels - How Dropbox’s Jess Jimenez Measures Security Momentum
item.description: Security metrics and frameworks capture state, not motion. In this week’s C2 Corner, Dropbox’s Interim Head of Security, Jess Jimenez, shares how CISOs can use flywheels to measure momentum, identify friction, and show Security’s true business impact.

item.title: C2 Corner: From Mandate to Maturity
item.description: Zero Trust has evolved well past the buzzword stage. For U.S. federal civilian agencies, it’s a legal requirement: Executive Order 14028 (2021) directed agencies to adopt Zero Trust by 2024 as a way to harden defenses against nation-state and criminal actors.

item.title: From Market Guide to Real World: Abstract's Influence in the Industry and Enterprise
item.description: From Market Guide to Real World: Abstract&#39;s Influence in the Industry and Enterprise

item.title: Gainsight Breach: SaaS Supply Chain Attack Exposes Salesforce Integrations
item.description: The Gainsight breach shows how OAuth misuse and SaaS supply chain trust gaps enabled unauthorized access to Salesforce environments. Learn what happened, why detection lagged, and how to protect against similar compromises using real-time monitoring and detection rules.

item.title: How Abstract Security Delivers Measurable ROI and Enhances Your Cloud SIEM
item.description: How Abstract Security Delivers Measurable ROI and Enhances Your Cloud SIEM

item.title: How Abstract Turns Security Into a Competitive Edge
item.description: Learn how Abstract Security shifts detection left to cut SIEM costs, reduce noise, and turn your SOC into a business enabler.

item.title: How Juul Labs Rebuilt Its Security Operations Using Abstract
item.description: uul Labs, a leader in consumer electronics manufacturing, was looking to modernize its security posture and IT infrastructure. Under the leadership of Pablo Quiros, VP & Global Head of Security and IT, they needed a solution with powerful security capabilities to support their growth, all while operating with a lean team.

item.title: How to Triage npm Malware Incidents | Free npm SBOM Tool for Fast Response
item.description: Learn how to quickly check if your projects are affected by npm malware or worms. Includes a free npm SBOM tool for rapid triage and tips for both small and enterprise teams.

item.title: Inside the Web of Scattered Spider: DFIR Lessons and the Future of Modern Detection
item.description: Uncover DFIR lessons from Scattered Spider incidents and learn how to enhance your detection strategies against advanced threats.

item.title: Integrating Security Data Pipelines with Detection
item.description: Integrating Security Data Pipelines with Detection

item.title: Introducing Abstract LakeVilla: Pipeline-Powered, Analyst Ready, and Efficient Storage
item.description: Introducing Abstract LakeVilla: Pipeline-Powered, Analyst Ready, and Efficient Storage

item.title: Introducing C2 Corner: By Practitioners, For the Industry
item.description: Introducing C2 Corner: By Practitioners, For the Industry
